hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [[ "$file_path" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && [ -f "$file_path" ] && command -v biome >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  biome check --write "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2 || true
fi
printf '%s\n' "$input"
